strengths: Nearly 20 years of hands-on software engineering across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems, exceeding the 15-year minimum
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform deployed on Kubernetes and used by Green Map
Current exposure to AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq, including MCP code generators and frameworks for agentic workflows
concerns: No demonstrated recognized AI expertise or shipped AI-powered products or platforms; AI work is recent (since April 2025) and tooling-adjacent
Career has been at senior/staff IC level on product teams; no evidence of director-level scope, engineering-wide strategy, or advising strategic customers
No Master's or PhD in an AI-related field, and cloud experience (AWS CDK, Kubernetes deployments) is applied rather than platform-strategy level

key_factors.factor: Recognized AI expertise and AI product track record
20 years engineering experience with founder/startup background

response.justification: The role's core competencies are recognized AI expertise with shipped AI products, cloud platform strategy, and director-level influence across engineering, product, customers, and partners. The candidate clears the minimum bar: a BS in Computer Science and roughly 19 years of engineering experience, plus genuine entrepreneurial credentials (founded and still runs GISCollective) and community leadership through conference talks and workshops (FOSS4G 2019, multi-day training courses). However, the AI competency rests on a single line about MCP code generators and agentic-workflow tooling at re:cinq since 2025 — no AI products, platforms, publications, or ML depth are evidenced. Cloud evidence is implementation-level (AWS CDK at Optilyz, Kubernetes packaging for GISCollective), not future-state platform strategy. There is no evidence of operating at director scope or advising strategic customers; titles top out at Staff/Senior on product teams. Strong senior engineer, but the evidence does not support the two highest-weight competencies for this Principal AI-strategy role.
